summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on designing onboarding and professional-development programs grounded in evidence, building practical, learner-ready training resources and job aids, and partnering cross-functionally for consistent, scalable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to eliminate manual work—through human-centered, systematic design.
